name: Azure AI Search Retrieve
description: Retrieve the most relevant knowledge from Azure AI Search using vector, keyword, or hybrid retrieval.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: azureSearchConnection
fields.title: Select Azure AI Search Connection
fields.description: Select the configured Azure AI Search connection containing endpoint and API key.

fields.name: topK
fields.title: Top K
fields.description: Number of nearest neighbor documents to retrieve per query.

fields.name: indexName
fields.title: Index Name
fields.description: Name of the Azure AI Search index to query.

fields.name: userQueryCol
fields.title: User Query Column
fields.description: Column containing the raw user query text.

fields.name: queryEmbeddingCol
fields.title: Query Embedding Column
fields.description: Column containing precomputed query embeddings used for vector search.

fields.name: retrievalMode
fields.title: Retrieval Mode
fields.description: Defines the retrieval strategy: pure vector, keyword search, or hybrid (default).
